name: Cherry-Cobbler Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease an 11x7-inch baking pan.
3. In a bowl, mix flour and baking powder.
4. In a large bowl, beat butter and confectioner's sugar with an electric mixer until pale and fluffy.
5. Beat in egg and lemon peel.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture on low speed.
7. Remove 2/3 of the dough.
8. With floured fingers, press the remaining dough over the bottom of the prepared pan.
9. Spread cherry pie filling over the dough to the edges of the pan.
10. Roll the reserved dough into a 1-inch ball.
11. Flatten the ball slightly and place it evenly on the cherry pie filling.
12. Bake for 30 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
13. Let cool in the pan.
14. Dust with confectioners' sugar before cutting.
